ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash value of the commit */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made the commit */,
  "author_date_unix_timestamp" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of when the commit was made */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the commit */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Type of commit (e.g., feature addition, bug fix, merge) */,
  "linked" INTEGER /* Whether the commit is linked to an issue */,
  "contains_bug" INTEGER /* Whether the commit contains a bug */,
  "fixes" TEXT /* Whether the commit fixes a bug */,
  "repository_id" TEXT /* ID of the repository where the commit was made */,
  "parent_commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent commit */,
  "merge_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the merge request */,
  "commit_type" TEXT /* Type of commit (e.g., feature, bug fix, merge) */,
  "files_changed_count" INTEGER /* Number of files changed in the commit */,
  "added_lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines added in the commit */,
  "deleted_lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines deleted in the commit */,
  "changed_lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines changed in the commit */,
  "commit_description" TEXT /* Description of the commit */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Labels assigned to the commit */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags assigned to the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_merge_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("merge_request_id") REFERENCES merge_requests ("merge_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_repository_id FOREIGN KEY ("repository_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repository_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_parent_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "author_email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "author_bio" TEXT /* Bio of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repository_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repository_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "repository_description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "repository_created_at" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of when the repository was created */,
  "repository_updated_at" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of when the repository was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit the metric is calculated for */,
  "ns" INTEGER /* Number of statements */,
  "nd" INTEGER /* Number of declarations */,
  "nf" INTEGER /* Number of functions */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy of the commit */,
  "la" INTEGER /* Length of the commit */,
  "ld" INTEGER /* Density of the commit */,
  "fileschanged" TEXT /* Files changed in the commit */,
  "lt" INTEGER /* Length of the commit message */,
  "ndev" INTEGER /* Number of developers involved */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the commit */,
  "nuc" INTEGER /* Number of unique changes */,
  "exp" REAL /* Experience of the developer */,
  "rexp" REAL /* Recent experience of the developer */,
  "sexp" REAL /* Sum of experience of the developers */,
  "glm_probability" REAL /* Probability of the commit introducing a bug according to the glm model */,
  "rf_probability" REAL /* Probability of the commit introducing a bug according to the rf model */,
  "code_complexity" REAL /* Code complexity of the commit */,
  "maintainability_index" REAL /* Maintainability index of the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "issue_title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of the issue */,
  "issue_status" TEXT /* Status of the issue */,
  "issue_created_at" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of when the issue was created */,
  "issue_updated_at" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of when the issue was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_commits" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id", "commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merge_requests" (
  "merge_request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merge request */,
  "merge_request_title" TEXT /* Title of the merge request */,
  "merge_request_description" TEXT /* Description of the merge request */,
  "merge_request_status" TEXT /* Status of the merge request */,
  "merge_request_created_at" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of when the merge request was created */,
  "merge_request_updated_at" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of when the merge request was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merge_request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merge_request_commits" (
  "merge_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the merge request */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merge_request_id", "commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit the file is changed in */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path of the file */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., added, deleted, modified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_files_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)
